race_name: L'Etape Cancun by Tour de France

top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic L'Etape Cancun by Tour de France's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before May.
When someone attacks on pancake-flat speed paradise, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
L'Etape Cancun by Tour de France's pancake-flat speed paradise forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 63 miles.
63 miles on pancake-flat speed paradise burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
L'Etape Cancun by Tour de France's pancake-flat speed paradise rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of L'Etape Cancun by Tour de France. Train it until it feels boring.
At L'Etape Cancun by Tour de France, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
2-minute all-out efforts on pancake-flat speed paradise. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At L'Etape Cancun by Tour de France, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what L'Etape Cancun by Tour de France's pancake-flat speed paradise actually does to you.
Double-threshold training builds sustained power with less fatigue. More FTP per hour of training.
Base fitness for L'Etape Cancun by Tour de France. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for L'Etape Cancun by Tour de France’s 63 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, VO2max, and Gravel Specific to prepare you for 63 miles of pancake-flat speed paradise in Cancun, Quintana Roo, Mexico.
